primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
note: a=21 is Fibonacci F_8; 3|21 but 9 not divides 21 (21 mod 9 = 3). Satellite opens but Singularity stays blocked. The 3 Satellite routes are (b=15,e=3), (b=9,e=6), (b=3,e=9) — all with bq in {3,6,9} and eq in {3,6,9} (the mul_3 mod-9 lattice).
